zh.lifeSummary: 當Reverend John Higgins - Knight於1528年出生在英國賀特福爾時，他的父親John James Higgins25歲，母親Elizabeth Charlotte Neives25歲。他於1544年與Mary Elizabeth Clynton在英國巴金哈姆爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1581年在他的家鄉享年53歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Reverend John Higgins - Knight于1528年出生在英国賀特福爾时，他的父亲John James Higgins25岁，母亲Elizabeth Charlotte Neives25岁。他于1544年与Mary Elizabeth Clynton在英国巴金哈姆爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1581年在他的家乡享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: Higgins
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hUiginn ‘descendant of Uiginn’, a byname meaning ‘viking, sea-rover’ (from Old Norse víkingr). Compare McGuigan .

English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): variant of Higgin, itself either a Lancashire variant of Huggin (from a pet form of Hugh ), or a variant of Hickin (from a pet form of Richard ), with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. See Hick and compare Higson .

variants.name: McGuigan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Liam, Mairead.
Irish (northern): perhaps an Anglicized form of Gaelic Mag Uiginn ‘son of the viking’ (see Higgins 1).
Irish (northern): Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Guagáin, a shortened form of Mag Eochagáin, son of Eochagán, a diminutive of Eochaidh ‘horseman’. Compare Geoghegan .

variants.name: Kiggins
meanings: Irish (Galway and Mayo) and Manx: shortened Anglicized form (with English excrescent -s) of Gaelic Mag Uiginn ‘son of the Viking’ (see Higgins ).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Reverend John Higgins - Knight was born in 1528, in Hertfordshire, England, his father, John James Higgins, was 25 and his mother, Elizabeth Charlotte Neives, was 25. He married Mary Elizabeth Clynton in 1544, in Buckinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1581, in his hometown, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Reverend John Higgins - Knight est né en 1528, à Hertfordshire, Angleterre, son père, John James Higgins, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Charlotte Neives, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Mary Elizabeth Clynton en 1544, à Buckinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1581, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Reverend John Higgins - Knight 1528 in Hertfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John James Higgins 25 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Charlotte Neives 25. Er hat 1544 in Buckinghamshire, England Mary Elizabeth Clynton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1581 im Alter von 53 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Reverend John Higgins - Knight è nato il nel 1528 nel Hertfordshire, England, il suo padre, John James Higgins, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Charlotte Neives, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Mary Elizabeth Clynton nel 1544, nel Buckinghamshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1581, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Reverend John Higgins - Knightが1528年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父John James Higginsは25歳，母Elizabeth Charlotte Neivesは25歳であった。1544年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアでMary Elizabeth Clyntonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1581年に故郷で53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Reverend John Higgins - Knight(이)가 1528년 영국 허트퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John James Higgins(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Charlotte Neives(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1544년 영국 벅잉함실르에서 Mary Elizabeth Clynton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1581년 그의 고향에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Reverend John Higgins - Knight nasceu em 1528, em Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John James Higgins, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Charlotte Neives, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Elizabeth Clynton em 1544, em Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1581, em sua cidade natal, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Reverend John Higgins - Knight родился в 1528 г. в местности хиртфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John James Higgins было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Charlotte Neives, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Elizabeth Clynton в 1544 г. в местности буккингхамшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1581 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Reverend John Higgins - Knight nació en 1528, en Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John James Higgins, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Charlotte Neives, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Mary Elizabeth Clynton en 1544, en Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1581, en su pueblo, a la edad de 53 años.
